scene_1.visual_plan: The scene opens with a medium shot of the model looking directly at the camera with a warm smile. As she begins speaking, the camera subtly zooms in to capture her genuine expression. After her first line, cut to a close-up shot of the product in her left hand, highlighting its features as she effortlessly showcases it. The background remains softly blurred to emphasize the model and product. The next shot returns to her in a medium close-up as she continues speaking, with the product now held closer to her waist. A secondary angle shows her hands gently touching the fabric to convey softness before cutting back to her face for an engaging connection.
scene_1.dialogue: もっと早くやっておけばよかった。前は服の見た目を気にしてて不安だったけど、解放してくれるものを見つけて、今は自信を持ってリラックス。ストレスもないんです。
